title: Robotaxis drives miles just to get cleaned and charged; this new startup wants to fix that
snippet: Aseon Labs, which came out of Y Combinator's 2026 spring cohort, has raised $10 million from Crane Venture Partners and others.

title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
snippet: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.
